Alzheimer’s Lead





Hi, my name is Alexander Lynch, and the incredible story you’re about to hear is 100% true. 



About three and a half years ago, my father pointed a shotgun to my face and pulled the trigger. 



He didn’t do it because he was a “psycho” or because there was some sort of family feud...



But because when I unintentionally startled him…



His early Stage II Alzheimer’s which, to that point, had never been diagnosed, caused him to become panicked and confused…



And as he ran to the closet, pulled out his 12 Gauge and fired it right at my head…



He simply believed he was protecting his home…not almost murdering his only son. 



It was one of the most disturbing and horrifying experiences of both of our lives…something that still gives me nightmares to this day…



And it’s also what sent me on a completely unexpected two-year-long journey through the dark underbelly of the multi-billion-dollar corporate medicine universe…



A journey that opened my eyes to the sick, predatory, and ultimately deadly practices of the pharmaceutical conglomerates…



And that would eventually lead to the discovery of a completely natural, 100% effective way to reverse even the most severe cases of Alzheimer’s, dementia, and many other memory related conditions…



No matter whether the one suffering was in the very late stages of such a disease, at initial onset, or simply at risk of “age” related memory loss.



It’s a method that’s based on breakthrough research conducted by a team of scientists at one of the nation’s top Ivy League universities…



It’s already been proven to be totally effective…



And all it takes is the destruction of a simple “evil agent” in your brain…something that until recently was poorly understand by the scientific world…



But that has now been pinpointed as the overwhelming cause of almost all memory-destroying diseases.



Now in the following 5 minutes… 



I’ll tell you exactly what this memory destroying neuro-agent is…



I’ll give you all of the research to support my claims…



And I’ll even show you the simple, inexpensive steps you can take right now to permanently stop it from ravaging your brain cells….



But if you’re ready to see just how simple it is for you…your parents, your grandparents…or any other loved one to conquer your Alzheimer’s and other memory related conditions…



It’s vital that you do stick with me to the very end.



Because even as you watch this, a sinister band of pharmaceutical mega-corporations are joining their forces to take this presentation off the Internet…



And they’re TERRIFIED of what will happen if you find out what I’m about to share with you inside this video. 



Of course honestly, they do have a good reason to be scared - they’ll lose billions of dollars if you and I can work to together to spread this message to our friends and loved ones…



In fact, they’re already starting to see the losses come in now that 43,289 American’s just like you have used this presentation to discover the TRUTH about memory related conditions while gaining the explicit details for how they can completely reverse those effects in just a few short weeks…



They don’t want there to be more people out there like Jonathan B, of Memphis, Tennessee, who says…





Car Accident Prevention Lead



What would you do if you were in this situation?



Opens with quick shocking video - car driving, suddenly blindsided by a semi truck or other large vehicle. Horror of crash.



You’re driving in the car with your family, minding your own business, obeying every traffic law.



Suddenly you hear terrifying sound of screeching tires and brakes…



And out of the corner of your eye, you see an 80,000 pound 18 Wheeler come shooting towards you like a bullet from a gun.



You have less than one tenth of a second to act…



Would you be able to react in time to save the lives of both you, and the passengers you were responsible for? 



Hi, my name is Kevin Flynn, and the situation I just described above is far from hypothetical.



Each year, there are more than 400,000 truck accidents…and 5,419,000 car crashes…



Out of these, more than 50% of the men, women, and children involved will be injured…



And more than 32,000 will be KILLED. 



Today, in this short presentation, I’m going to show you how you can make sure that both you, and every single person you love, never becomes a statistic.



You’ll see how a bizarre, but extensively tested “mind technique” can improve your reaction time when driving by more than 100%...



And GUARANTEE that even if you are a second away from being blindsided by an out of control motorist who’s driving at twice the posted speed limit…



Your mind and body will kick into autopilot, take control of your vehicle, and do EXACTLY what’s needed to avoid the crash and save your life.



To date, this easy to learn method for making yourself absolutely crash-proof has stopped a documented 12,400 accidents from occurring…



It saved Bailey Hutchinson’s life. She lives in San Antonio, Texas, and she writes…





Lotto Letter #1 Lead



I couldn’t believe I was being held at gunpoint by the convenience store owner.



I thought THEY were the ones who got held up, not the other way around.



And yet there I was, standing in an empty QuickMart, with a gun pointed to my head.



The man said he was on to me…that even though he didn’t know exactly how…I had to be doing something fishy…



That he just simply couldn’t believe there was any way for a person to win the lottery 5 times in three months period…let alone from his single store.



I tried to tell him that I wasn’t doing anything illegal…or cheating…or breaking any rules. That I just had a simple system I was using…and that it happened to work really, incredibly well…



Heck, I even offered to share it with him, but the angry man just wouldn’t listen…and I was afraid that I was about to die.



And I shutter to think of what would have happened if a group of teenagers hadn’t come into the store right then…forcing the raving mad business owner to quickly put away his .44 Caliber…



But as soon as they did I ran for my life…making it to my car and burning rubber as I peeled out of the parking lot and towards the safety of my home.  



Until that night, I’d been on such a high. I mean I’d won more than $324,000 in the last four months just by playing the lotto and using a deceptively simple system I’d created to predict winners…



-Some Pictures of Him Holding Checks or Winning Tickets-



I’d settled all of my debts…some of which had been haunting me for years…



I’d taken my family to Disneyworld for two weeks…where we stayed in their “Royalty Sweet” and really did live like kings…



-Picture of Family in Disneyland, or Picture of a Really Nice Hotel Suite-



I’d been able to buy my two sons all of the clothing they’d been wanting for years…new basketball shoes…top of the line new bikes…everything…



I’d even just closed on the house of my dreams…a two-story brick home in a beautiful quite neighborhood, in the best school district in the entire county. 



-Picture of a beautiful two-story brick home-



But having that gun pointed to my head sure snapped me back to reality in a hurry. I realized that if I was going to keep using this breakthrough system I’d created…and keep building long-term wealth by putting more and more money in the bank with it…



I’d need to start being a lot more careful.



Because here’s the truth: once you know how to crack the lotto code, which is what I want to share with you in this short video…



There are going to be a lot of people who aren’t happy about it.



As you hold winner after winner for months at a time…you’ll have to start rotating the convenience stores where you buy your tickets…because the owners HATE having to pay out cash from their registers…



And even when you win the larger prizes…$4,000, $14,000, maybe $140,000 or so…



These store owners and managers still won’t be happy – they become afraid the state will start investigating them…and trying to figure out what makes their store so “special.”



That’s the thing though – it has nothing to do with their store…and everything to do with HOW you’re picking your numbers.



That’s the secret to how I’ve managed to win the lotto 5 times in the last three months…and 14 times in the last two years.



These winners weren’t all major jackpots by the way…some of the tickets were just for $8,000, or $14,000. Not enough to make you rich…but certainly enough to make your life a whole heck of a lot better.



And it’s the same secret a small handful of other lucky people have used to do the same thing once I shared it with them.



People like…



Remy P, Virginia Beach, Virginia, who recently wrote me saying…





Lotto Letter #2 Lead



I couldn’t believe I had to put my OWN brother in jail.



But then again, I also couldn’t believe that he’d tried to hire a professional hit man to kill me.



It happened after I’d hit my fifth jackpot of over $5 million in less than a year. 



-Pictures of the guy holding different checks or winning tickets-



And even though I’d promised that I’d share the incredibly simple formula I’d been using to win all this money…



The one that had allowed me to “crack the lotto code”…



And find these ridiculously obvious patterns in the way the lotto corporations picked their winning numbers…



My brother simply hadn’t had the patience to wait for me to reveal my secret. 



To be honest, I’m completely heartbroken about what happened…



But if there’s any silver lining here, it’s that at least I can help you avoid a similar fate.



Because make no mistake:



Once you start using this lotto decoding formula…



Which I’m going to share with you inside this short, and extremely controversial video…



You WILL be a target.



Now hopefully it won’t be as crazy as what happened with my brother (I’ll tell you that whole bizarre story in a second)…



But you should be prepared:



People aren’t going to be able to stand watching your life change overnight, before their very eyes…



They’re going to be insanely jealous as you move into a beautiful house…with a sparkling swimming pool and an entirely separate “wing” for the children…



-Picture of beautiful house with pool-



They’re going to hate seeing you sitting in the plush leather seats of the brand new luxury car you just purchased with cash…



-Picture of awesome luxury sedan-



And watching you take your family on yet ANOTHER vacation to Paris…or some tropical island they’ve never even heard of. 



- Family Post Card from some Island. Or family picture on a tropical beach - 



And most importantly of all…



They are going to be ENVIOUS as you continue to cash-in winning ticket after winning ticket…



Bringing in $5,000, $7,800, heck even $20,000 every single month – like clockwork.



-Let’s just show three images of three different people holding lotto winnings for now to keep the flow. 1. An old man. 2. An old lady. 3. A middle aged man.- 



Trust me…



When you can generate this kind of money “on demand”…



And with nothing but a pen and a paper and some basic elementary school math…



People get bitter.



So if this kind of success and wealth scares you…



You may want to turn this video off now. 



I won’t blame you at all.



For some folks, the drama that comes with suddenly shooting into the 1% is just too much…



And I completely respect that. 



But if you ARE curious as to how it was that someone like me…



A working class police detective with no college education…



Was able to uncover the biggest lotto loophole in history…



And net over $29 million in the process…



Then stick with me over the next 10 minutes. 



Because I promise: the method I’ll be showing you can work for anyone. 



There’s no big secret, and it’s completely legal (even though the lotto companies wish DESPERATELY that it wasn’t). 



All you have to do is harness the power of two mathematical laws…



Called “Clustering” and “Spontaneous Order”…



(They may sound fancy but they are actually very simple to understand)



And you will be absolutely amazed by how quickly you’re feeling the joy of holding a winning ticket in your hand – and knowing your life has changed forever. 



I certainly know I was.





Herpes Lead



Hi, my name is Dr. Samantha Buehler, and today I’m going to make you cry. 



Now don’t worry, I’m not a psychopath...



I’m talking about tears of joy. 



That’s because in the following brief video presentation…

To permanently eliminate the herpes virus from the human body.



Based on a brand-new breakthrough in medical research…



Something the $60 billion a year pharmaceutical industry is DESPERATE to keep hidden from you... 



This all-natural treatment protocol takes less than 3 weeks to complete…



Works for both HSV-1 and HSV-2…



Requires ZERO expensive, side effect filled medications…



And will cost you less than $50 total to perform.



Imagine…



In just 21 days from right now, you could be completely free from the gnawing shame…and constant fear…that come from always hiding your dirty little secret from the world.



You’ll never have to worry about telling the boy you like (and who likes you back) that you’re damaged goods…and that you can never be intimate with him…



You’ll never have to feel exposed and terrified by another HUMILIATING outbreak…or experience the itching, burning, and blistering that goes along with one. 



If it sounds too good to be true, don’t worry. I completely understand.



In fact, I would have thought the same thing if I hadn’t been part of the research time that discovered this cure…



Or if I hadn’t personally used this natural treatment to completely destroy every single trace of the herpes simplex virus in my body in less than a month.



All I ask is that you keep an open mind as you watch this short video…



Because in the next five minutes I will not only give you the science and medical proof as to why this breakthrough treatment method works…



I’ll even tell you how to start using it TODAY…so that you set a countdown timer to being 100% herpes free in just 21 days from now. 



Just like 27,442 other women (and men) before you have already done.



People like Janet Holly from Des Moines, Iowa, who writes…
